title: BAM Alignment to CP018802 for Submission to GenBank
author: Gregory P Harhay
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.862hzge

steps.title: Geneious 11
steps.instruction: Geneious 11.1.5 Biomatters Ltd or another read mapper such as BowTie2 samtools 1.9 GitHub http://htslib.org/

steps.title: Nine PacBio CCS libraries were mapped to CP018802 L
steps.instruction: Nine PacBio CCS libraries were mapped to CP018802 L.17494 L.17495 L.17836 L.18256_1 L.18256_2 L.18257 L.19770 L.19771 L.19981 Mapping Parameters: Geneious Assembler, Medium Sensitiivity/Fast, iterate up to 5 times, Map multiple best matched randomly for 9 libraries Export each alignment to SAM

steps.title: Edit each SAM with SAM tools...
steps.instruction: Edit each SAM with SAM tools to append library as read group (RG) ID and append sample RG tag to each of the SAM alignments generated samtools addreplacerg -r ID:LB:17494 -r SM:63250 -m overwrite_all -o L.17494_GeneMap_CP018802_RG.sam L.17494_GeneMap_CP018802.sam Edit SAM read group (@RG) metadata, append library (LB) and sample (SM) metadata for each SAM, need to remove original @RG header line, for example change @HD VN:1.0 SO:unsorted @SQ SN:CP018802 LN:2110642 @RG ID:Unpaired_reads_assembled_against_CP018802 SM:L.17495_GeneMap_CP018802 @RG ID:LB:17495 SM:63250 to @HD VN:1.0 SO:unsorted @SQ SN:CP018802 LN:2110642 @RG ID:LB:17495 SM:63250 and save file

steps.title: samtools merge H_somni
steps.instruction: samtools merge H_somni.L.101617.S.63250.bam L.19981_GeneMap_CP018802_RG.sam L.19771_GeneMap_CP018802_RG.sam L.19770_GeneMap_CP018802_RG.sam L.18257_GeneMap_CP018802_RG.sam L.18256_2_GeneMap_CP018802_RG.sam L.18256_1_GeneMap_CP018802_RG.sam L.17836_GeneMap_CP018802_RG.sam L.17495_GeneMap_CP018802_RG.sam L.17494_GeneMap_CP018802_RG.sam Merge SAM files into a single BAM

steps.title: BAM file available at https://trace
steps.instruction: BAM file available at https://trace.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/Traces/sra/sra.cgi?run=SRR8080935 , the download BAM file is named SRR8080935_CP018802.bam
